blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,697 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
